name: TDD-STATE-MACHINE-BACKLOG-6
title: Test coverage gaps + simplification: defensive branches, _post_transition_hooks consolidation
description:
Test gap closures:
1. _load_checks_module returns None when contract/lib/checks.py is absent (silent failure mode)
2. _run_spec_update_checks no-op when feature-dir/docs/spec/ does not exist
3. check_numbered_lists raising exception (bare except return path)
4. Force path through spec-update to test-red fires _run_spec_update_checks (only normal-forward tested)

Simplification: collapse the two duplicated branches in tdd-step.py (lines 388-389 and 397-398) into a single post-transition hook dispatcher _post_transition_hooks(cur, new, d) that owns both _post_test_green_hooks and _run_spec_update_checks routing.

Promote import importlib to file-level imports.

Document or drop the sys.modules.pop purge in _load_checks_module (only needed for multi-call assumption).

history.note: TDD cycle complete (secondary item resolved by same commit)
